register.title: Become a Licensed Partner Bureau
register.subtitle: Join our network of verified marriage bureaus and earn lifetime commissions

step2.title: Business Details
step2.registrationPlaceholder: Leave blank if applying for registration
step2.registrationHint: Registered businesses preferred, but we accept new bureau applications
step2.rentedDesc: You have a rental agreement (will need to provide)
step2.referenceCountHint: Number of people you currently help with rishta services (estimate okay)

step3.title: Payment & Terms
step3.feeNote: 💰 Application fee is required now. Registration fee payable only after approval (14-day review). In-person verifications are billed at PKR 20,000 when both parties agree; after a 20% portal fee, you receive PKR 16,000.
step3.depositNote: ⚠️ Deposit PKR 20,000 now and upload proof below
step3.uploadPlaceholder: Click to upload or drag and drop
step3.uploadHint: PNG, JPG, or PDF up to 5MB
step3.termsAccept: I understand and accept the {termsLink}. I acknowledge that the application fee is non-refundable and that approval is subject to review (14-day SLA).
step3.nextStepsNote: After submission, our team will review your application within 14 days. You'll receive an email with approval status. If approved, you'll pay the PKR 200,000 registration fee and receive your license.

landing.heroSubtitle: Connect with verified marriage bureaus across Pakistan or become a partner and earn lifetime commissions
landing.heading: Why Partner With Us?

benefits.commissionDesc: Earn PKR 799.80/month for every member you refer, for as long as they remain subscribed
benefits.verificationDesc: Receive PKR 20,000 per verification when both parties approve; payout is PKR 16,000 after 20% portal fee
benefits.payoutsDesc: Automatic weekly payments (Monday-Sunday cycle) directly to your bank account
benefits.territoryDesc: Only 20 licensed bureaus per city - secure your territory and build your business
benefits.dashboardDesc: Track referrals, commissions, and member activity in real-time through your bureau portal
benefits.supportDesc: Comprehensive onboarding, marketing materials, and ongoing support from our team

landing.investment: Total Investment: PKR 220,000 (PKR 20,000 application fee + PKR 200,000 registration fee)
landing.territory: Territory Limit: 20 bureaus per city maximum
landing.requirements: Requirements: Valid CNIC, business registration (or application), physical office
landing.verification: Verification Payout: PKR 20,000 charged when both parties agree; bureau receives PKR 16,000 after 20% portal fee
landing.support: Support: Training, marketing assets, and onboarding guidance
landing.browseCities: Browse priority cities and secure your slot

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Your journey to finding a meaningful connection starts here

step1.title: Create Your Profile
step1.description: Sign up with email, phone, or Google. Complete your profile with photos and preferences.

step2.title: Get Verified
step2.description: Upload ID and verification photos. Our agents review within 30 minutes for your safety.

step3.title: Discover Matches
step3.description: Browse verified profiles based on your filters. Swipe yes on those who interest you.

step4.title: Start Conversations
step4.description: When both parties express interest, start chatting in our secure, encrypted messaging.

step5.title: Unlock Video Calls
step5.description: Earn points through engagement. Unlock video calls after meeting time and points requirements.

step6.title: Meet In Person
step6.description: Optional: Request in-person verification through our trusted Marriage Bureau partners.

privacy.title: Your privacy, our priority
collectItems: Account data: name, email, phone, password (hashed)
Usage data: swipes, messages, device info, locale
Verification data: ID images, in-person verification artifacts
useItems: Fraud prevention, safety reviews, and moderation
Product analytics to improve the experience
shareItems: Payment processors (JazzCash, EasyPaisa, banks) for billing
Marriage Bureau partners for in-person verification (only with consent)
controlItems: Access/edit profile and preferences in your account
Delete account via settings or by emailing privacy@internationalrishta.com
Request data export by contacting support
privacy.seeAlso: See also: Terms of Service and Safety

terms.title: Know your rights and responsibilities
terms.eligibilityDesc: You must be 18+ and legally able to enter into agreements. Accounts may be suspended for fraud, harassment, or policy violations.
useItems: No harassment, hate speech, or abusive behavior.
No impersonation or sharing of others' private information.
Keep communications on-platform; off-platform sharing is at your own risk.
paymentsItems: In-person verification: PKR 20,000 when both parties agree; 20% platform fee, PKR 16,000 to bureau.
Application and registration fees for bureaus are non-refundable.
terms.verificationDesc: You agree to provide accurate information. Verification photos/IDs are used for safety checks. In-person verification is optional but adds trust.
conductItems: No explicit content, scams, or solicitation.
We may moderate, suspend, or remove content that violates these terms.
terms.liabilityDesc: Service is provided 'as is'. We are not liable for offline meetings or outcomes. Use personal judgment and safety guidelines.
terms.seeAlso: See also: Privacy Policy and Safety

about.missionDesc: To build a respectful, secure platform that helps families and individuals find meaningful, lasting matches with confidence.
howItems: Verified profiles, swipe discovery, secure messaging, and video unlocks.
Bureau partners handle in-person verification and earn commissions.
Transparent pricing: PKR 3,999 (referral) / PKR 4,999 (direct); verification PKR 20,000 with 20% platform fee.
about.contactDesc: Email us at <email>info@internationalrishta.com</email> or call our helpline.

contact.subtitle: Reach out for support, partnerships, or press.

safety.title: Stay safe while you connect
safety.subtitle: Our top guidelines to keep you protected on and off the platform.
onPlatformItems: Verify your profile; keep your info accurate.
Use in-app messaging and video before meeting.
Report suspicious behavior; we moderate swiftly.
meetingItems: Meet in public places first; share plans with a trusted person.
Bring ID for bureau verifications; confirm agent identity.
Never send money or share financial details.
safety.verificationDesc: In-person verification costs PKR 20,000 when both parties agree. 20% platform fee applies; PKR 16,000 goes to the bureau. Receipts are issued via the platform.
safety.helpDesc: Contact support or your assigned bureau. Urgent issues: report via the app and email <email>safety@internationalrishta.com</email>.
